hooks.command: bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "/src/" && ! echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "_project-scaffold"; then DOCS_DIR=$(echo "$FILE" | sed "s|/src/.*|/docs/|"); MISSING=""; [ ! -f "${DOCS_DIR}design-brief.md" ] && MISSING="$MISSING design-brief.md"; [ ! -f "${DOCS_DIR}content-brief.md" ] && MISSING="$MISSING content-brief.md"; [ ! -f "${DOCS_DIR}page-plans.md" ] && MISSING="$MISSING page-plans.md"; [ ! -f "${DOCS_DIR}motion-spec.md" ] && MISSING="$MISSING motion-spec.md"; if [ -n "$MISSING" ]; then echo ""; echo "[PIPELINE GATE] Foundation docs missing:$MISSING"; echo "Run Creative Director (Step 1) before writing src/ code."; echo "See .claude/pipeline.md for the required sequence."; fi; fi'

bash -c 'FILE="$TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE "\.vue$"; then ISSUES=""; grep -q "import axios" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ISSUES="$ISSUES
  - AXIOS direct import: use service layer"; grep -qE "JSON\.parse" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ISSUES="$ISSUES
  - JSON.parse in component: move to store/service"; grep -qE "gsap\.(to|from|fromTo).*?(width|height|top|left|right|bottom)[^T]" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ISSUES="$ISSUES
  - Animating layout property: use transform/opacity only"; grep -qE "will-change" "$FILE" 2>/dev/null && ISSUES="$ISSUES
  - will-change detected: remove preventive usage"; if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then echo ""; echo "[ANTI-PATTERN]"; echo -e "$ISSUES"; fi; fi'

bash -c 'echo ""; echo "[V3 CHECKLIST]"; echo "  - Foundation docs complete? (design-brief, content-brief, page-plans, motion-spec)"; echo "  - Motion variety? (no consecutive sections same technique)"; echo "  - prefers-reduced-motion respected?"; echo "  - All sections passed 7-layer validation?"; echo "  - Meta tags + OG on every page?"; echo "  - Images: alt + dimensions + lazy loading?"'
